title: Consolidated Taxonomy-Bridge Alignment Report — Final Decision

remaining_limitations.reason: Only reachable from passed+partial runs. Advisory scope excludes passed run_status.
No bridge combined_status produces 'unknown_status'. Used only when bridge result is missing combined_status key.
Only from passed+completed. Explicitly excluded by is_excluded_status().

final_decision_rationale: All 9 bridge combined_statuses now resolve to taxonomy templates via explicit alignment. Template coverage improved from 4 to 6 within advisory scope. Newly exercised: ['anomaly_run_passed_goal_not_completed', 'blocked_no_goal_progress']. 0 violations across all subissues. Backward-compatible: standard config unaffected (use_taxonomy_bridge_alignment=False default). 3 remaining limitations documented (not gaps — correct exclusions by design). Decision: taxonomy_bridge_aligned. Advisory scope unchanged. No auto-execution. No global default. Rollback immediate.
summary: EPIC #910 complete. Alignment: 4→6 templates. Newly exercised: ['anomaly_run_passed_goal_not_completed', 'blocked_no_goal_progress']. 0 violations. Final decision: taxonomy_bridge_aligned.

findings.finding: All 9 bridge combined_statuses now resolve to a taxonomy template via alignment (0 fallbacks within scope)
Template coverage improved: 4→6 in-scope templates exercised (+2)
All advisory invariants hold: auto_executable=False, advisory_only=True, is_gate=False, affects_loop_decision=False
3 remaining template limitations documented (not gaps — correct exclusions)
findings.detail: run_passed_goal_partial: excluded scope. unknown_status: internal fallback. completed: excluded by scope.

findings.finding: Alignment is backward-compatible: existing selected_advisory config unaffected (use_taxonomy_bridge_alignment=False default)
findings.evidence: 130/130 existing #904 tests still pass with standard config

recommendations.recommendation: Use make_selected_aligned_activation_config() for all new advisory enrichment
recommendations.rationale: Aligned config provides 6/9 templates within scope (was 4). Fallback only for edge cases.

recommendations.recommendation: Do NOT remove run_passed_goal_partial, unknown_status, completed templates from taxonomy
recommendations.rationale: They serve specific purposes: run_passed_goal_partial for future passed-run coverage; unknown_status for internal fallback; completed for documentation of the exclusion.

recommendations.recommendation: Do NOT auto-execute any advisory recommendation
recommendations.rationale: All recommendations advisory-only. Human action always required.

recommendations.recommendation: Do NOT expand advisory scope to passed runs or new report types without explicit mandate
recommendations.rationale: Current scope (failed/blocked runs, 5 selected report types) is validated. Expansion requires new EPIC.
